presentation.description: I specialize in building fast, accessible, and well-designed web experiences. I work with React, Vite, and modern APIs. I'm interested in performance and pixel-perfect UX.

experience1.description: Web application development using React, Node.js, and SQL/NoSQL databases. Performance improvement and UX optimization. Performance improvement and UX optimization.
achievements: I implemented a system that reduced loading times by 40%.
I developed a complete dashboard with JWT authentication.
I designed reusable components with advanced React patterns.

experience2.description: Full backend development for a scalable e-commerce platform, handling inventory, purchase orders, and payment gateways. Implementation of microservices to decouple business logic.
achievements: I designed and implemented a RESTful API for product and user management.
Successful integration with Stripe for payment processing.
I ensured data consistency through database transactions.

experience3.description: Creation of an advanced user interface for a data analytics SaaS product. Development of interactive real-time data visualizations and highly configurable table components.
achievements: Complete UI/UX redesign, resulting in a 25% increase in user retention.
I implemented dynamic charts with D3.js and Chart.js to display key metrics.
Frontend performance optimization using React Context and memoization.

experience4.description: Development of a custom Content Management System (CMS) for clients. The system allows dynamic content creation and publishing, with a powerful rich text editor.
achievements: Construction of a custom WYSIWYG content editor based on Draft.js.
Implementation of role-based access control (RBAC) for different user levels.
Configuration of infrastructure with continuous deployment (CI/CD) using GitHub Actions.

experience5.description: Development of a backend API and database schema for a mobile multiplayer game. The system handles player data, game state, and real-time interactions.
achievements: Designed a scalable database schema using MongoDB and Redis for real-time data.
Developed RESTful API endpoints with Node.js and Express.
Implemented real-time features using WebSockets for multiplayer interactions.
